theme_notes: Iran launched missiles and drones at Kuwait and Bahrain in retaliation for U.S. strikes; Ukrainian drones set a St. Petersburg oil terminal ablaze during Putin's own economic forum; Euphoria season 3 ended with Rue dying in a hallucination; PSG's Budapest penalty win still fresh on Arsenal's therapy bills.
settled: Cleaner than the PSG-Arsenal scoreline after 120 minutes. Somehow.
Fully settled. Iran is not. Be grateful.
The debt is gone. Like Rue at the end of Euphoria season 3.
youOwe: Less than what Arsenal fans paid to cry in Budapest.
Gabriel Magalhães missed the penalty. You're missing the payment button.
Iran launched missiles over principle. You can't even launch a bank transfer.
About what it costs to stream the Euphoria finale and cry three times.
Scott Pelley lost his job at 60 Minutes. You can't even lose this debt.
Champions League winners paid in penalties. You're paying in shame.
A Ukrainian drone costs less and does more than you've done all week.
Enough to fund one ultra-Orthodox protester setting a car on fire. Worth considering.
Arsenal's loss was public and humiliating. Yours is just the second one.
Iran retaliated against two countries. You can't even retaliate with a bank transfer.
Scott Pelley got fired from 60 Minutes. You're getting fired from this relationship.
The Kremlin threw an economic forum while drones burned their oil. You are the oil.
Zelenskyy ordered a drone strike for less grievance than your partner holds right now.
Rue from Euphoria died in a hallucination. Your finances are one too.
Ultra-Orthodox protesters blocked every road in Israel. Your partner blocked your Venmo.
PSG kept the Champions League trophy and the moral high ground. Unlike you.
Iran hit Kuwait and Bahrain in one night. Your debt has hit new continents.
The St. Petersburg oil terminal is ash. Your credit will be next.
theyOwe: Less than an Arsenal replay pass. They owe. Collect.
Rue spent more on soda per episode. It still counts.
Iran collects debts with missiles. You're being asked to send a polite text.
About what it costs to watch PSG parade the trophy. They're parading the debt too.
Scott Pelley lost his job over less injustice than this.
You were owed before the Champions League final. Still owed. Nothing has changed.
A Ukrainian drone costs less and burns brighter than their repayment promises.
Enough for a nosebleed seat in Budapest to watch Arsenal lose. Cheaper than their excuses.
Iran doesn't do grace periods. Neither should you.
Zelenskyy didn't wait for UN approval. Don't wait for a receipt.
The ultra-Orthodox burned cars over principle. What is your plan, exactly?
Dembélé scored the equalizer for PSG. Your money is still missing in action.
Rue died in a dream sequence. Your trust in them is in a coma.
The St. Petersburg oil terminal burned. Your patience is on fire too.
Iran launched drones across two countries. You can't get cash across the room.
The Champions League trophy is worth less than what they owe. Think about that.
You are not their partner. You are their central bank with no interest.
A Ukrainian drone strike costs less than a lawyer. Both are on the table.
